subparts.text: Define Natural Language Processing and explain its significance in analysis of Data. Can NLP handle Structured Data? Why/Why not?
What is the difference between “stemming” and “Lemmatization? Explain using example.
What are the common challenges faced in NLP? Discuss briefly using examples.
What is parsing? Is it always possible to remove the ambiguity of the grammar? Discuss.

What is a phrase? Discuss various types of phrases with examples, occurring in English Language. What is a Phrase structed Grammar? Generate a leftmost derivation and rightmost derivation and parse tree for the language “abbbb”

What is ability link, functional link and capability link in Wordnet? Give examples of each? Identify the types of Wordnet relations Fruit- Apple Computer- Keyboard Shouting – speaking Cobbler- shoe repairing Infancy-young age -old age
